caption:
Count your logins right now.

Booking software. Texting app. Review platform. A spreadsheet where leads disappear.

Most service businesses run four or five tools that never talk to each other. A lead gets answered in one inbox and buried in every other one.

The Black Arrow platform runs it as one system: CRM, a unified inbox for every text and email, two-way texting, booking, missed-call callbacks, review collection, win-back sequences, and revenue reporting that shows where the money came from.

Try full access for 14 days. No card, cancel anytime.

Refer a business. When they subscribe, you both get a free month, tracked without extra steps.

See it running on your own leads.

DM "TRIAL".

#ServiceBusiness #CRM #LeadFollowUp #SmallBusinessGrowth #HomeServiceMarketing
rationale: Fills the under-served Platform/Free Trial category by naming the real tool-sprawl pain the app's unified feature set solves, using the reach-favoring reel format for a cold-audience offer.
